name: fuyu-portfolio-cloudflare-pages
description: Fu Yu portfolio static site deployed to Cloudflare Pages.

scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const html=fs.readFileSync('public/index.html','utf8');const bad=/fu-yu-portfolio-open-design\\.vercel\\.app|vercel\\.app|\/_next/.test(html);if(bad){console.error('Found stale Vercel or _next references.');process.exit(1)}console.log('No stale Vercel or _next references found.')"
